title: TubNet Tourneys Public Resource Pack
description: The TubNet Tourneys resource pack usable in TubNet and vanilla Minecraft!
body:
TubNet Tourneys is discontinued, this resource pack will no longer be updated unless the project restarts
Thank You for supporting us!
- TotallyNoCallum ## About TubNet Tourneys Pack usable in TubNet and Vanilla Minecraft!

Supported Languages:
English (US)
English (UK) [Bedrock only]
## Custom Items List (Java Only for now) Usage: `/give [player_name] minecraft:coal{CustomModelData:1}`.
`minecraft:coal{CustomModelData:1}` - Tourneys Cup 3D Model ## TubNet Tourneys Socials Twitter, Twitch, YouTube Channel ## How to Install / Use **Java Edition:**
Put the pack zip/files in `%appdata/.minecraft/resourcepacks/`.
To use this Pack in TubNet, use this mod.

**Bedrock Edition:**
Option A: Download the mcpack file and open it, Minecraft should open and import the pack for you.

Option B: Manual Import
Step 1: download the zip file.
Step 2: Go to this location:
Windows 10/11: `%localappdata%\Packages\Microsoft.MinecraftUWP_8wekyb3d8bbwe\LocalState\games\com.mojang\resource_packs`
Android: `Minecraft/games/com.mojang/resource_packs/`
IOS: `On My iPhone/Minecraft/games/com.mojang/resource_packs/`
Step 3: unzip the files and put them in the resource packs folder.
Step 4: Open Minecraft and pray you've done it correctly.

**GeyserMC Server(s)**:
Step 1: Insert the pack into `server.properties` like you normally would on a normal java server.
Step 2: Download the Bedrock mcpack file and put it in `plugins/geyser/packs/` (`packs/` for standalone geyser servers)
Step 3: Restart your server if its running ## Known Issues [BR] - The Controller help text may disappear when a controller is connected to the game, theres nothing I can do about this :(
## Notes I wasn't able to import the GUI textures in bedrock, because of how bedrock guis works :(
I (TotallyNoCallum) is the one who created these Resource Packs, don't accuse me of stealing it from TubNet Tourneys somehow
